headline: Workday (WDAY): Cheap AI Stocks to Buy According to Analysts
summary: Workday Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of the cheap AI stocks to buy according to analysts. On May 21, Workday announced its financial results for FQ1 2027, reporting total revenues of $2.542 billion, a 13.5% increase year-over-year. Subscription revenues reached $2.354 billion, up 14.3% from the same period last year. Backed by a strong core business, […]

headline: Bridgewater Associates Is Trading the Software Apocalypse as It Sells Workday, Salesforce, Other Key SaaS Stocks
summary: Bridgewater’s massive exit from top SaaS stocks is fueling fears that AI could upend the traditional software business model and reshape the next era of tech investing.

headline: WDAY Q1 Deep Dive: AI-Driven Product Momentum and Margin Expansion Define Quarter
summary: Enterprise software company Workday (NASDAQ:WDAY) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.5% year on year to $2.54 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.66 per share was 5.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
